## Checklist

- [ ] The test suite passes locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Spell check passes (`codespell`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (docs/, docstrings, README) if needed
- [ ] `pyproject.toml` version bumped if this is a release-worthy change
- [ ] No stray license headers, debug prints, or commented-out code
